ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the player (if applicable) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position(s) played by the player */,
  "teams" TEXT /* Teams played for by the player */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "career_stats_link" TEXT /* URL to detailed career statistics */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* Category ID linking to the player's category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_bodies" (
  "voting_body_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each voting body */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the voting body (e.g., BBWAA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting body */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact details for the voting body */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the voting body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "voting_body_id" TEXT /* Voting body that conducted the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Specific date of the election */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any special notes or comments about the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_voting_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_body_id") REFERENCES voting_bodies ("voting_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "voting_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Election ID that this result belongs to */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* Player ID that this result belongs to */,
  "ballots" INTEGER /* Number of ballots cast in the election */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the player */,
  "inducted" TEXT /* Induction status of the player (Y/N) */,
  "percentage_votes" TEXT /* Percentage of votes received by the player */,
  "year_of_eligibility" INTEGER /* The year the player first became eligible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "voting_result_id" INTEGER /* Voting result ID that this vote belongs to */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Voter ID that cast this vote */,
  "vote" TEXT /* Vote cast (e.g., Y/N) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "vote_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_voting_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_result_id") REFERENCES voting_results ("voting_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the voter */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the voter (e.g., newspaper, team) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
